info.name: Acronis Cyber Files API
info.description:
Provides access to secure content management features for use in your own product, including automation of file storage, sync, share, and search.

Full Reference [https://developer.acronis.com/doc/files/v1/reference/](https://developer.acronis.com/doc/files/v1/reference/)

Copyright © 2019-2024 Acronis International GmbH. This is distributed under MIT license.

item.name: Issue a JWT token for Cyber Files API Calls

urlencoded.description: The Time-based One-Time Password (TOTP) code required for accounts with two-factor authentication (2FA) enabled.

request.description: For Cyber Files API other type of grant type than for Account Management API. It must be grant_type equals password.
